Your Stylist

A Well-Rounded
Hair Artist

My name is Aurora — but everyone calls me Roe. I'm a licensed cosmetologist with deep expertise across locs, natural hair, braids, and barber work. Whether you're starting your loc journey or maintaining a mature set, every appointment is crafted with care and intention.

I specialize in Traditional Locs, Loc Extensions, Sisterlocks™, Box Braids, Fades, Natural Hair Styling, Loc Wigs, and more — tailoring every service to your unique texture and goals.

✦   Licensed Cosmetologist · Missouri · Since 2010
What We Offer

Our Services

Every service is fully customized to your hair type, texture, and personal journey.

01
Starter Locs

Begin your loc journey with a professional installation shaped around your hair's natural texture and your long-term vision.

02
Loc Maintenance

Retwists and interlocking services to keep your locs clean, tight, and thriving at every stage of growth.

03
Loc Extensions

Add instant length and fullness — including faux locs, soft locs, and goddess locs — seamlessly blended to your pattern.

04
Box Braids

Classic and jumbo box braids, knotless braids, and protective braid styles crafted to perfection.

05
Fades & Barber Work

Clean fades, tapers, and shape-ups. Precision barber work for a sharp, polished finish every time.

06
Natural Hair Styling

Wash & go's, twist-outs, protective styles, and treatments that center the health of your natural strands.

07
Loc Wigs

Custom-crafted loc wigs offering the versatility of locs without the permanent commitment — stunning and protective.

08
Loc Updo Styling

Creative updo and styled looks for your existing locs — perfect for special occasions or a fresh everyday look.

09
Weekly Specials

Rotating featured services and seasonal offers. Ask about current specials when you schedule your visit.

The Work

Portfolio

Book Now →
Certified Trainee

Discover
Sisterlocks™

Sisterlocks is a precision loc system that works entirely with your natural hair texture — no added product, no heavy manipulation. The result is tiny, uniform locs with unmatched flexibility and styling range.

As a registered Sisterlocks Trainee, I offer consultations and am listed in the official trainee directory at sisterlocks.com. Book a consultation to learn if Sisterlocks is right for your journey.

Book a Consultation
Before You Book

Booking Policy

Payment

Full payment is required at every appointment. Please come prepared. Non-payment will not be tolerated.

Photography

Photos of your hair may be taken for portfolio use. Your face will never be photographed without your consent.

Identification

Please provide your name, address, phone number, and email at booking. Service will not be rendered without this info.

Guests

No additional guests at appointments unless pre-approved. Please reach out in advance if you need an exception.
